title: Rice Delight (A Farmer's Delight Add-on)
description: A  Farmer's Delight add-on expanding the possibilities of rice.
body:
Bring new flavor to your fields with this rice-focused add-on for Farmer’s Delight!
This mod expands the humble grain into a world of comforting and creative dishes, giving rice the spotlight it deserves. Craft warm tortilla wraps and hearty burritos, enjoy perfectly packed onigiri for your adventures, or treat yourself to sweet apple & cinnamon rice after a long day of farming. Designed to blend seamlessly with Farmer’s Delight’s cozy cooking style, this add-on adds more depth, variety, and delicious possibilities to your kitchen—perfect for players who love immersive food progression and flavorful survival gameplay.





✨ Features

🌾 Expanded Rice Cooking – Gives rice a bigger role in your kitchen with new savory and sweet recipes

🌯 Tortilla Wraps & Burritos – Craft hearty, portable meals perfect for long adventures

🍙 Onigiri – Simple, filling rice snacks inspired by traditional Japanese cuisine

🍎 Apple & Cinnamon Rice – A warm, cozy dessert option made from familiar ingredients

🥘 Seamless Farmer’s Delight Integration – Fits naturally into existing progression, tools, and aesthetics

🎨 Vanilla-Friendly & Immersive – Recipes, visuals, and balance designed to feel right at home

🧩 Lightweight Add-On – No bloat, just more delicious possibilities for rice lovers
